title: Naples Under the Kiss of Fire
writer: Marcel Achard, Auguste Bailly, Ernesto Grassi
actors: Tino Rossi, Michel Simon, Mireille Balin
plot: Mario Esposito, who sings in a Neapolitan restaurant, is in love with Assunta, the niece of Teresa, the owner of the place. He shares his apartment with Michel, his best friend. This one has fallen under the spell of Lolita, a gor...
